name: Pierpaolo Vendittelli
title: Postdoc Researcher - Medical AI & Computational Pathology
location: Nijmegen, The Netherlands · Open to Italy · Remote EU · US-remote
summary: I am Pierpaolo Vendittelli, a postdoctoral researcher developing deep-learning systems for digital pathology, spanning whole-slide image segmentation, multi-center clinical AI pipelines, prognostic modeling, and downstream applications of foundation models.

My current work focuses on Wilms tumor grading at the Prinses Maxima Center for Pediatric Oncology. During my PhD at Radboud University Medical Center, I worked on pancreatic cancer prognosis, tumor segmentation, and tumor microenvironment quantification.

I also design LLM-based automation tools to streamline research workflows and professional social media management. This portfolio brings together my publications, projects, CV, and ongoing learning log.
openTo: Open to Applied Scientist, ML Engineer, and R&D roles across medical AI and applied ML.

schema.jobTitle: Postdoctoral Researcher in Medical AI and Computational Pathology
schema.description: Postdoctoral researcher developing deep-learning systems for digital pathology, clinical AI pipelines, and LLM-based automation for research workflows.

worksFor.name: Prinses Maxima Center for Pediatric Oncology

alumniOf.name: University of Cassino and Southern Lazio
